title: High School SPED Math Teacher
summary: Provide high school math instruction within a special education resource/inclusion setting. Develop and implement IEPs, support students with academic and behavioral needs, and collaborate with general education staff.
responsibilities: Provide instruction in high school math within a special education setting.
Develop and implement IEPs and instructional plans.
Support students with academic and behavioral needs.
Collaborate with general education teachers and staff.
Monitor student progress and participate in IEP meetings.
rubric_hints: Special education and high school math experience
